_template_metadata.purpose: Path-independent Zenodo deposit metadata template for M9 SIARC-MASTER-V0 announcement
_template_metadata.fill_convention: __SLOT_*__ fields are path-dependent and operator-fillable at deposit time; __VERIFIED_*__ comments mark anchor pre-verified at fire time
_template_metadata._forbidden_verb_set_data_note: The strict 8-verb forbidden-verb list (per 096 audience_framing_and_venue_list.md sect 2.1 + relay 103 envelope STEP F.1) is stored as data in the sibling `_forbidden_verb_set_listing` field below. The list is intentionally enumerated there (not in substrate-prose body fields) to preserve operator information without echoing the verbs in deposit-bound text.

metadata.title: SIARC Master Conjecture V0: Announcement of E / P_k / B Stratification and the Φ Assignment
metadata._description_fill_instruction: Compose the abstract from two substrate sources, in order: (a) P-008 SYNTH M9 V0 announcement draft (when on disk; queued under W21 LANE-1 Mon 2026-05-12 cadence as the synth-side `w19-synth-p008-m9-v0-announcement-draft` queue item); (b) 096 phi_assignment_statement.md sect 5 V0 announcement skeleton (canonical substrate; bridge sessions/2026-05-07/T2-M9-V0-SUBSTRATE-PRE-STAGE-096/ SHA-256 prefix 14CA0AA1A1AEB176). Per 096 audience_framing_and_venue_list.md sect 2.1 forbidden-verb translation table (Reviewer A BS-2; bridge same session SHA-256 prefix 55D660762301C17E), the abstract must avoid the strict forbidden-verb set in any substrate-prose context (the 8-verb list is enumerated in 096 audience_framing_and_venue_list.md and in `_template_metadata._forbidden_verb_set` of this file; do NOT echo the set as a literal in the description body). Permitted alternatives include: states, introduces, sets out, presents, describes, supplies, outlines, records. Length target: 250-400 words for math-ph default audience (per 096 sect 3 row 1). Two-tier framing per peer-AI synthesis Q4 4-of-4 AMEND consensus: V0 states the assignment-level Phi (objects -> objects, with morphism behaviour described informally), with categorical-coherence verification deferred to M13.

communities._note: Per zenodo_upload_ct_v13_runbook.md §5: 'leave whatever v1.2 had (likely none, or `siarc-program` if you have a community)'. Operator inspects existing umbrella v2.0 record (10.5281/zenodo.19965041) at deposit time and copies whatever community array is present there; if empty, leave empty. Empty array is acceptable to Zenodo.

metadata._license_note: VERIFIED canonical across SIARC umbrella v2.0 + PCF-1 v1.3 + PCF-2 v1.3 + CT v1.3 + T2B v3.0 + D2-NOTE v2.1 (per zenodo_upload_ct_v13_runbook.md L26 + RESUME_AFTER_REBOOT_20260502.txt L37-43).
metadata._publication_type_note: VERIFIED per zenodo_upload_ct_v13_runbook.md L67: 'Resource type — leave as Publication / Preprint'. The Zenodo enum value is `preprint`.
metadata._publication_date_note: Operator fills at deposit time. Target W21 end: 2026-05-15 Fri. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.
metadata._version_note: Initial deposit. First version on a fresh concept. If a v0.x preprint is staged earlier (e.g. for synth review), increment accordingly.

M4 ratification (068 ACCEPT verdict) gate. At W21 LANE-1 Mon 2026-05-12 deposit time, fill with the bridge URL of the form `https://github.com/papanokechi/siarc-relay-bridge/tree/main/sessions/<DATE>/<068-RATIFY-TASK-ID>/`. If 068 lands as ACCEPT_WITH_REVISIONS or REVISE, route to operator (deposit gate not satisfied).

M6.CC R1-closure (058 main-fire-V3 GO verdict) gate. At W21 mid-week deposit time, fill with the bridge URL of the form `https://github.com/papanokechi/siarc-relay-bridge/tree/main/sessions/<DATE>/<058-V3-TASK-ID>/`. If 058 V3 lands NO_GO or PARTIAL, route to operator (deposit gate not satisfied).

VERIFIED 096 TIER-A substrate pre-stage bridge URL. Phi assignment statement + numerical consistency check + related-work survey + audience framing + venue list. Bridge HEAD at fire time 213d23b. The substrate underlying this V0 announcement.

086 R5 lit-hunt triangulation bridge URL. Optional: include only if the V0 description cites V1 chart-map cross-walk via 086 NEW_CANDIDATE_B4. Source: 096 unexpected_finds U6. Format: `https://github.com/papanokechi/siarc-relay-bridge/tree/main/sessions/<DATE>/T2-R5-LIT-HUNT-TRIANGULATION-086/`.

metadata._contributors_note: Empty by default. If LANE-1 synth or peer-AI reviewers are to be acknowledged at the deposit-metadata level (not just in acknowledgements text), populate per Zenodo schema.
metadata._references_note: Bibliographic references (free text) optional. Zenodo's `references` field is rarely used when `related_identifiers` carries the cross-deposit chain; populate only if reviewer feedback at LANE-1 indicates extra free-text citations are needed (e.g. Mazzocco 2014 / Lisovyy-Roussillon 2017 / Garoufalidis-Kashaev 2018 from 096 related_work_survey RELATED-or-DEFERRED tier).
metadata.notes:
__SLOT_OPTIONAL_NOTES__

FILL INSTRUCTION: Empty unless a specific Zenodo-side note is required. If used, common patterns are: deposit-time gating context (`Deposited following M4 ratification + M6.CC R1-closure both landed in W21`), or a forward-pointer to the umbrella v2.1 supersession (`SIARC umbrella v2.1 supersession will absorb this V0 announcement; pending operator action`).

_post_deposit_actions: 1. Capture minted concept DOI + version DOI.
